name: affiliate-operations-hq
description: Control plane and automation runner for multi-channel affiliate operations.

scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build --workspace @affiliate-ops/web && npx --yes wrangler@4.113.0 deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build --workspace @affiliate-ops/web && npx --yes wrangler@4.113.0 deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.check: npm run repo:check && npm run architecture:check && npm run code:health && npm run duplicate:check && npm run code:map && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
